options.content:
Dashboard Refresh
Real-time overview of dashboard refresh and performance

Overall Status
Last Refreshed
Loading…
Last Refresh Duration
{{duration_secs}} s
Good performance
Success Rate
{{success_rate}} %
All refreshes successful

targets.rawSql: SELECT rs.status, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM max(rl.last_refreshed_at)) * 1000)::bigint AS last_refreshed_ms, COALESCE(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rs.finished_at - rs.started_at))::numeric, 1), 0) AS duration_secs, COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN rl.status = 'success' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)), 0)::integer AS success_rate FROM heart360tk_reporting.matview_refresh_status rs LEFT JOIN heart360tk_reporting.matview_refresh_log rl ON true WHERE rs.id = 1 AND $UserIsAdmin = 1 GROUP BY rs.status, rs.finished_at, rs.started_at

options.content:
{{#if (eq status 'queued')}}
{{else if (eq status 'in_progress')}}
{{else}}
{{/if}}

targets.rawSql: SELECT status, CASE WHEN status IN ('queued','in_progress') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_busy FROM heart360tk_reporting.matview_refresh_status WHERE id = 1 AND $UserIsAdmin = 1

SELECT
  matview_name AS "Materialized View",
  (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM last_refreshed_at) * 1000)::bigint AS "Last Refreshed",
  ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM refresh_duration) * 1000)::numeric, 2) AS "Duration",
  status AS "Status"
FROM heart360tk_reporting.matview_refresh_log
WHERE $UserIsAdmin = 1
ORDER BY last_refreshed_at DESC NULLS LAST

list.name: UserIsAdmin
